calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Fialco and Carolyn Farren for Jane Kirby (Trustee).

Ms. Fialco addressed the issue of venue stating that administration of the Trust takes place in San Francisco, that they do the books/business for the Trust here and that the address is here. With respect to the property, the Court stated that deeds are quite clear as to how title is held. Ms. Fialco stated that there are documents that show the Decedent's intent, that there is a pour over will, that the Decedent signed deed of trust documents, that the Decedent's prior home was in the Trust, that it was sold and that she then purchased this property, and that the Decedent believed this is what was needed to put the house in the Trust. Ms. Farren stated that the Decedent specifically told her that the house was in the Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was taken under submission awaiting a declaration that lays out venue.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
